reviews.text: best laptop at the best price I've ever gotten! battery lasts forever it hasn't I've had it two or three days it hasn't even drained to drop yet okay and also I had a little hiccup because I accidentally locked the key or something but it's super easy to manage and fix and also easy to transfer your files and pictures and also the fact that it's pink just gives me such a great mood and I just can't get over how gorgeous it is and I'm so grateful they made a pink one like this every girl should get one!!!!

OK so I left my laptop at my parents house and it is too far away to go back to retrieve for a few months. So … I bought this one for unbelievably low price. With simple on screen set up it perfectly mirrors my other computer so I am up and running for a lot less money that the fast would cost to go back. Great buy!!!
Purchased for adult daughter's bday! She loves it my granddaughter wants to trade hers with her moms bc she loves the color

Great product for price, it is very quick and proficient. This computer has so many surprises I've yet to experience. I give it a 5 for it being just awesome for the price and the swiftness of the keyboard, mouse, compatibility, the connection ability, and the speed as well as size. I would have given it 5 stars however I've only owned it for a few weeks, and yet to see the compatibility of it with needed software. Also for some reason I thought this was a touchscreen totally a great computer yet nope no touchscreen.

reviews.title: Quality laptop
reviews.text: Good laptop but however does not have hold a charge very long. Laptop is good quality, sets up well. Good for price..works really well with a mouse.
so far it works great. wasnt the one i really wanted but,i couldn't wait because i needed a laptop the day i ordered this on.
cancel order. delivered to someone else, don't ask who, all day with a simple order, never again omgosh

reviews.title: Terrible, Weak Sound,  and Battery Runs Down Fast.
reviews.text: With system sound settings and speakers turned up to 100, it still has terrible, weak sound. I even reinstalled the driver. Also, the battery runs down fast. The old HP laptop I replaced had excellent sound.
It didn't work the operating system crashed three hours of my time almost 2 hours of the manufacturer time could not fix
Yeah this laptop is the lamest piece of crap this laptop is not for business you can't download anything you can't install anything crap
